claim: The mass the reader reserves for an unseen atom should track the recent RATE of newcomer arrivals (high after a burst, low after a confirmation plateau), not a hand-set constant blind to newcomer recency.
stimulusShape: matched-mass burst/plateau streams in membrane+music+text; loud-surface control = total mass via the constant reserve
verdict: GAP CONFIRMED + MECHANISM CONFIRMED (2 senses); generalization SCOPED; fix NOT promoted (kept behind RULES_REV)
mechanism: noveltyAmplitude = Σ γ^(at-1-s) over each atom's first-appearance step s — the γ-decayed newcomer count — carried as the `novelty` amplitude through the UNCHANGED Born step (surpriseAt/forwardDist). Context enters at the amplitude; the law does not move.
layer: interior: src/core/surprise.js (pure modality-agnostic helper) + perceiver wiring in src/perceiver/reading.js, behind RULES_REV. Flag off (default) → byte-identical, 671 tests green. Flag on → 7 reserve-sensitive goldens shift (the promotion cost, mapped).
omnimodalGate: PASS — context reserve separates burst>plateau (AUC=1.0) in music AND text (different organs), plus the membrane mechanism proof.
control: burst/plateau matched on atom-multiset and length → identical total γ-mass → constant reserve cannot separate (membrane/text AUC=0.5; music anti-correlated AUC=0.0). A channel that separates is reading novelty rate, not mass.
generalization: lag-1 newcomer discrimination AUC across diverse real streams: metamorphosis +0.29, wiki(Mark Sanford) +0.25, esker -0.12, twinkle(music) -0.43; aggregate -0.002 (flat). Tracking recent rate lifts positively-autocorrelated novelty (natural text) and regresses anti-correlated alternation (a simple scale repeats each new note). A smoother rate-normalized amplitude is strictly worse (aggregate 0.371), so the γ-decayed count is the better signal-derived variant.
scope: HOLDS: the reserve tracks recent novelty rate, removing the blind-constant defect, confirmed in two senses. DOES NOT HOLD yet: a universal next-step prediction win — a rate-only amplitude ignores autocorrelation SIGN.
deeperGap: A signal-derived reserve needs the autocorrelation STRUCTURE of the newcomer process (does novelty persist or alternate?), not merely its rate. Seed for a future cycle.
disposition: kept behind the gate, not promoted; parity + mechanism + control locked
